summary: The routing-accuracy evaluation corpus now contains the full planned 200 prompts across all six buckets, matching the 32/32/32/32/36/36 target split.
Running classifyPrompt() on the first 100 prompts produced TP=46, FP=3, FN=14, TN=37, with precision=93.9%, recall=76.7%, and F1=84.4%.
Initial Gate 3 mismatches cluster into false_negative_missing_positive_trigger=9, false_negative_read_only_override=5, false_positive_generic_write_token=3.
Gate 3 misses write-producing workflows whose phrasing lacks a canonical positive trigger token.
Gate 3 suppresses mixed prompts that combine read-only verbs with genuine file-write intent.
Gate 3 fires on prompt-improvement or other non-file tasks when they contain generic write verbs.
